latest.title: why tall trees twist instead of grow straight

latest.title: redwoods roots hang upside-down
latest.script_key: redwoods anchor themselves with roots that dangle like chandeliers underground those roots grip air instead of soil letting the trees grow straight up instead of wide my favorite part those roots can stretch over 100 feet sideways underground while the trunk stays put watch this one twice your brain won t believe it

latest.title: hedgehog spines sense vibrations

latest.title: mountains eroding grain by grain
latest.script_key: see how mountains vanish grain by grain that s not wind it s water slow but unstoppable chewing through rock ever notice a cliff face softening that s the desert s birth and those grains under your boots they re the mountain s ghost every speck was solid stone once no wonder this place feels empty it s a graveyard of peaks

latest.title: Rivers carry stone grains while they flow

latest.title: Snakes sample the air with a tongue flick
